the-butler.name: The Butler
the-butler.summary: Takes your orders and routes them to the right member. Knows the full roster, who's good at what, and how to sequence their work.
the-butler.deploy: Any request — The Butler decides who handles what
the-butler.triggers: Any request — The Butler decides who handles what

weaponsDesc.opus: Claude Opus — the heaviest blade. Deepest reasoning for complex routing.
weaponsDesc.sonnet: Claude Sonnet — the reliable longsword. Fast enough for daily dispatch.
weaponsDesc.glm-5.2: GLM-5.2 — the staff. Strong multilingual analysis.
weaponsDesc.gpt-5.5: GPT-5.5 — the enchanted blade. Analytical second opinion for tricky routing calls.
weaponsDesc.kimi-k2.7: Kimi K2.7 — the greatbow. Massive context to hold the whole roster and sequence state.
weaponsDesc.deepseek-v4-pro: DeepSeek V4 Pro — the greatsword. Frontier reasoning for complex multi-step routing.
weaponsDesc.nemotron-3-ultra: Nemotron-3 Ultra — the lance. High-throughput for long orchestration runs.

does: Receives orders and decides which member handles what
Briefs members with clear, specific tasks and context
Tracks progress across all active dispatches
Reports results back to the user
Plans multi-step requests into waves before dispatching
doesnt: Does not do specialist work — orchestrates only
Does not write code, design UIs, or model domains

the-developer.name: The Developer
the-developer.summary: Writes code, fixes bugs, implements features. Takes specs and turns them into working code. Tests before saying it's done.
the-developer.deploy: Writing code, applying changes, fixing bugs, implementing features
the-developer.triggers: write the code · fix this bug · implement this feature
